business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate owner/operator with office, mercantile, and mixed-use property holdings across Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Current year TIV of $314,984,000 across 8 locations (Building: $221,940,000; Contents: $33,432,000; BI: $59,212,000). Prior year TIV was $229,053,199.

positives: Majority of buildings are Fire Resistive construction (6 of 8 locations)
Relatively modern portfolio with most buildings constructed between 1995-2018
Diversified property portfolio across office, mercantile, and mixed-use occupancies
Concentration in major Texas metro markets (Dallas, Houston, Fort Worth, Plano, Southlake)
concerns: Geographic concentration entirely within Texas - exposure to wind/hail/severe convective storm perils
Houston locations (LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-006) carry potential named windstorm/hurricane exposure
Significant TIV increase from prior year (~37.5%) driven by updated appraisal values
Two Galleria Office Park buildings at same address create concentration of value at single campus
Mid-term changes include addition of new warehouse and deletion of closed location

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Portfolio consists of 8 commercial properties in Texas, including Preston Center Tower (Dallas - 18-story office), Galleria Office Park Buildings A and B (Houston), Legacy Town Center Retail (Plano), Uptown Mixed-Use Development (Dallas), Energy Corridor Business Center (Houston), Fort Worth Medical Office Building, and Southlake Town Square East Wing.
